Package recoder.io

Class ProjectSettings

java.lang.Object
recoder.AbstractService
recoder.io.ProjectSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyNames, Service
public class ProjectSettings extends AbstractService implements PropertyNames
The project settings object manages global properties such as search and output paths, and options for the pretty printer and can save and load a textual representation of these informations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class recoder.AbstractService

    serviceConfiguration

    Fields inherited from interface recoder.io.PropertyNames

    ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE, ALIGN_LABELS, CLASS_SEARCH_MODE, ERROR_THRESHOLD, GLUE_CONTROL_EXPRESSIONS, GLUE_DECLARATION_APPENDICES, GLUE_EXPRESSION_PARENTHESES, GLUE_INFIX_OPERATORS, GLUE_INITIALIZER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_LABELS, GLUE_MEMBERS, GLUE_PARAMETER_LISTS, GLUE_PARAMETER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_PARAMETERS, GLUE_SEQUENTIAL_BRANCHES, GLUE_STATEMENT_BLOCKS, GLUE_UNARY_OPERATORS, INDENT_CASE_BRANCHES, INDENTATION_AMOUNT, INPUT_PATH, JAVA_5, JDK1_4, OUTPUT_PATH, OVERWRITE_INDENTATION, OVERWRITE_PARSE_POSITIONS, TABSIZE

  • Method Details

    • java5Allowed

      public final boolean java5Allowed()

    • setProperty

      public String setProperty(String key, String value)
      Defines a property with the given name and value and informs all registered listeners. The method will automatically remove all segments from the search path that do not exist.
      Parameters:
      key - the name of the property to set.
      value - the value of the property to set.
      Returns:
      the old value associated with the key, or null if this property has not been set.

    • getProperty

      public String getProperty(String key)
      Returns the property with the given name.
      Parameters:
      key - the name of the property to look for.
      Returns:
      the property associated with the given key.

    • getDefaultProperty

      public String getDefaultProperty(String key)
      Returns the default property with the given name.
      Parameters:
      key - the name of the default property to look for.
      Returns:
      the property associated with the given key.

    • getProperties

      public Properties getProperties()
      Returns a copy of the currently valid properties.
      Returns:
      a copy of the currently valid properties.

    • ensureSystemClassesAreInPath

      public boolean ensureSystemClassesAreInPath()
      Ensures that the class file repository can find "java.lang.Object" by adding the proper path to the search path list. This method must be called explicitly after creation of a service configuration.
      Returns:
      true, if the class file repository knows how to find "Object", false otherwise.

    • ensureExtensionClassesAreInPath

      public void ensureExtensionClassesAreInPath()
      Ensures that the class file repository can find ext classes from the magic directory by adding the proper path to the search path list. This method must be called explicitly after creation of a service configuration.
      Since:
      0.72

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener l)
      Registers a property change listener.
      Parameters:
      l - the listener to register.

    • removePropertyChangeListener

      public void removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener l)
      Deregisters a property change listener.
      Parameters:
      l - the listener to deregister.

    • getSearchPathList

      public PathList getSearchPathList()
      Returns the current shared search path list.
      Returns:
      the current search path list.

    • getErrorHandler

      public ErrorHandler getErrorHandler()
      Returns the current error handler. If no error handler is set, a DefaultErrorHandlerwill be constructed.
      Returns:
      the current error handler.

    • setErrorHandler

      public void setErrorHandler(ErrorHandler handler)
      Sets the current error handler and registers it as a change update listener.
      Parameters:
      handler - the new error handler.
